gh_092f5dc57ae7d0ee6678dd17.title: Software Engineer
gh_092f5dc57ae7d0ee6678dd17.description:
### Link to Job Posting

https://jobs.lever.co/ivo/1629cbb2-c07c-4214-a1e2-b4e96c9cc66c

### Company Name

Ivo

### Job Title

Software Engineer

### Location

San Francisco

### Does this job offer sponsorship?

Offers Sponsorship

### Is this internship currently accepting applications?

Yes

### Email associated with your GitHub account (Optional)

_No response_

### Extra Notes (Optional)

**Engineering at Ivo**

Engineers at Ivo are inventors. Ivo was first-to-market with:
• An AI agent that lives in MS word and edits the document for you [2023]
• Ditching imprecise embeddings models in favor of agentic RAG [2023]
• Large-scale LLM-based legal fact extraction [2024]
• A legal assistant that can search large contract databases, without sacrificing accuracy [2024]
• Clustering legal documents descended from the same family [2025]
• Automatic deviation analysis to locate buried risk in huge contract databases [2025]
• Merging contracts with their amendments to make a time series of “composite” contracts (a customer actually cried when we showed her this) [2025]

**Role**
Engineers at Ivo design, create and deploy generative AI products. You’ll work across the stack on:
• Developing full stack generative AI functionality
• Shipping high performance UI code and backend systems that process and analyze millions of contracts reliably
• Designing pipelines that orchestrate LLMs, data extraction, and clustering algorithms at scale
• Collaborating with designers, lawyers and other engineers to re-imagine how lawyers work in the AI age

**Mission**
Every major business has an in-house legal team, and all of those lawyers are overworked. 80 hour weeks, tight deadlines and contract-reading death marches are the industry norm. Up until recently, there wasn’t anything technology could do to help this situation.

LLMs have given us the ability to give these lawyers their lives back, and at Ivo, that’s our mission.

We’re building an AI-native platform to automate legal drudgery. People love our software - despite high competition, we have the highest trial win rate on the market (85%). We’re genuinely improving people’s lives, and we’re only just getting started.

**Ivo might be a good fit for you if you:**

- You love writing code, but you love having impact more: We’re a team of engineers at heart, but our #1 goal is building the best possible product. That means making pragmatic choices and looking for 80/20 solutions.
- Would describe yourself as being [relentlessly resourceful](http://www.paulgraham.com/relres.html).
- You have a strong internal sense of urgency. You have a bias towards doing things *today*, rather than tomorrow.
- Experience working in a startup environment is preferred but not required.
- Are excited about the adventure of building a company!

**FAQ**

- How far along are we? We launched in early access in 2023. Since then, we’ve had an incredible response from the market and are growing rapidly. We 6x'd in ARR in the last 12 months. Our clients include companies like Uber, Reddit, IBM, Canva, Pinterest, WordPress, and more. We're happy to share more details with candidates who go through our interview process.
- Can I work remotely? We have an in-office culture, with some hybrid flexibility.
- Compensation: The USD salary range for this role is $130K-$485K. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors, including, experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed above.

gh_0916ca6958d7f404418dfcce.title: AI Power Planning App - Machine Learning/Artificial Intelligence Engineer- Brooklyn, NY - $170-225K + Equity
gh_0916ca6958d7f404418dfcce.description:
**Machine Learning/Artificial Intelligence Engineer** Role 

Working for a startup that has created **an AI-powered networking planning app**

Location: **onsite 4 days a week in Brooklyn, NY** 

Salary: **$170-220K + equity** 

Fulltime/staff role  

Job Description: 

* Design, develop, and maintain AI pipelines on AWS for LLaMA and other LLMs.
* Utilize AWS Bedrock for scalable AI solutions.
* Create and manage knowledge-based systems to enhance AI capabilities.
* Train, fine-tune, and optimize **LLMs** for various applications.
* Perform prompt engineering to improve model performance and user interactions.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI solutions into products.
* Conduct research and stay updated with the latest advancements in AI and machine learning.
* Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to AI models and pipelines.
* Document processes, experiments, and results for future reference.

* M.S. or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or a related field.
* Proven experience working with Large Language Models (LLMs) such as LLaMA.
* Strong expertise in AWS services, including **AWS Bedrock,** and building scalable AI pipelines.
* Proficiency in programming languages such as **Python** and experience with AI/ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch).
* Experience in prompt engineering and optimizing AI models.

* Experience with predictive models and optimization algorithms.
* Experience with backend architecture in a startup setting.
* Familiarity with MLOps practices and tools.
* Contributions to open-source AI projects.

How to apply: 

Please send an email to **breezy@adtalentinc.com**

gh_0942ed9736ea13305338edbc.title: São Paulo - Desenvolvedor(a) Backend Júnior (PHP e o framework Laravel e banco de dados relacionais)
gh_0942ed9736ea13305338edbc.description:
Desenvolvedor(a) Backend Júnior (PHP e o framework Laravel e banco de dados relacionais)



100% Presencial na Casa Verde Alta, São Paulo.



O valor/hora é de R$ 24 (média de 180 horas/mês).



Requisitos obrigatórios:

● Mais de 1 ano e meio de experiência.

● Experiência sólida com PHP e o framework Laravel.

● Habilidade para criar e otimizar queries em SQL puro.

● Experiência com bancos de dados relacionais, como MySQL, PostgreSQL e/ou SQL Server.

● Docker.



Diferenciais não obrigatórios:

● Conhecimento em arquitetura back-end e lógica de programação para resolver problemas complexos.

● Experiência prática com PHP puro para criação de scripts ou funcionalidades específicas.

● Conhecimento em configuração e gerenciamento de servidores Linux, incluindo instalação e monitoramento de serviços.

● Experiência básica com Java para integrações ou funcionalidades complementares.

● Capacidade de implementar e consumir APIs RESTful.

● Familiaridade com ferramentas de versionamento, como Git, e práticas de branching.

● Experiência em criar e manter scripts automatizados para tarefas recorrentes (ex.: envio de e-mails, relatórios, processamento de dados).

● Conhecimento básico em crawlers para coleta de dados e automação.

● Habilidade em configurar ambientes de desenvolvimento e produção com Docker e Docker Compose.

● Experiência com metodologias ágeis, como Scrum ou Kanban.

● Noções básicas de CI/CD e ferramentas como GitHub Actions ou Jenkins.

● Experiência em criar e manter scripts automatizados para tarefas recorrentes (ex.: envio de e-mails, relatórios, processamento de dados).

● Experiência média em HTML e CSS para o desenvolvimento de e-mails e PDFs no Blade.



● Conhecimento em infraestrutura AWS além do EC2 (RDS, S3, Lambda, etc.).

● Familiaridade com padrões de design de software, como DDD ou Clean Architecture.

● Experiência com filas de mensagem (RabbitMQ, Kafka, etc.).

● Participação ativa em comunidades de desenvolvimento ou contribuição para projetos open source.



Responsabilidades:

● Desenvolver e manter aplicações back-end utilizando Laravel, garantindo uma arquitetura robusta e escalável.

● Criar e otimizar APIs RESTful, com foco em desempenho e segurança.

● Implementar queries complexas utilizando SQL puro para manipulação e análise de dados.

● Desenvolver funcionalidades específicas em PHP puro, quando o uso de frameworks não for necessário. Entre outros.

gh_090ec5551d3f6aaef4d24f26.title: VAGA PESSOA DESENVOLVEDORA PHP JÚNIOR/PLENO | P21 SISTEMAS | HOME OFFICE
gh_090ec5551d3f6aaef4d24f26.description:
Estamos em busca de você, Pessoa Desenvolvedora PHP Júnior para atuar na P21 Sistemas.

A P21, é uma empresa especializada no desenvolvimento de sistemas para cartórios, que está há mais de 20 anos no mercado, entregando softwares de qualidade aos seus clientes.

E esse sucesso só é possível, porque contamos com um time de pessoas altamente comprometidas. Temos orgulho de pertencer a P21, uma empresa com valores sólidos e cultura colaborativa, time sempre em 1º lugar!

Junte-se a nós e venha fazer parte dessa história!

Seu dia a dia aqui com a gente:

• Análise e desenvolvimento de rotinas;
• Desenvolvimento e integração com webservice;
• Manutenção de infraestrutura;
• Testes;
• Suporte de nível técnico sob demanda.

O que buscamos:

• Desejável ensino superior na área de análise e desenvolvimento de sistemas (concluído ou em andamento)
• Conhecimento de metodologia ágil,
• Conhecimentos em MVC, POO e Design Patterns (diferencial testes automatizados).
• Apache/Nginx
• PHP
• MySQL
• HTML/CSS
• JavaScript

Será um diferencial se você possuir:

• Desejável conhecimentos Zendframework
• Desejável conhecimentos de desenvolvimento de micro service

Benefícios
Plano de saúde;
Vale alimentação;
Auxilio home office.

Outras informações

Oportunidade 100% remota
Contratação CLT

Para se inscrever é facil, envie seu Currículo + Link do seu Linkedin + sua pretensão salarial para o e-mail: recrutamento.juliananunes@gmail.com.

gh_09890261c637c697ed8da307.title: GoFull Inc - Backend Developer (PHP)
gh_09890261c637c697ed8da307.description:
## Description

GoFull Inc. is looking for an experienced Backend Developer (PHP) to join our team. If you have excellent programming skills and a passion for developing applications or improving existing ones, we would like to meet you.

As GoFull's Backend Developer, you’ll work closely with our engineers to ensure system consistency and improve user experience.

Ultimately, you should be able to develop and maintain functional and stable web applications to meet our company’s needs.

## Responsibilities

- Participate in the entire application lifecycle, focusing on coding and debugging
- Write clean code to develop functional web applications
- Troubleshoot and debug applications
- Perform UI tests to optimize performance
- Manage cutting-edge technologies to improve legacy applications
- Collaborate with Front-end developers to integrate user-facing elements with server side logic
- Gather and address technical and design requirements
- Provide training and support to internal teams
- Build reusable code and libraries for future use
- Liaise with developers, designers and system administrators to identify new features
- Follow emerging technologies

## Requirements

- Proven work experience as a Backend Developer
- In-depth understanding of the entire web development process (design, development and deployment)
- Hands on experience with PHP and other programming languages like Java, Ruby and Python
- Working knowledge of CMS framework
- Familiarity with front-end languages (e.g. HTML, JavaScript and CSS)
- Excellent analytical and time management skills
- Teamwork skills with a problem-solving attitude
- BSc degree in Computer Science or relevant field

## Skills

- PHP
- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript

## Apply

https://gofull-inc.workable.com/jobs/383267

## People

[Pak H. Chau](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pakhchau) - Founder/CEO
